meanings.definition: plastic surgery to remove wrinkles and other signs of aging from your face; an incision is made near the hair line and skin is pulled back and excess tissue is excised
examples: some actresses have more than one face lift

meanings.definition: inconclusive as to outcome; close or just even in a race or comparison or competition
examples: as they approached the finish line they were neck and neck
the election was a nip and tuck affair

meanings.definition: even or close in a race or competition or comparison
examples: the horses ran neck and neck
